json_data.title: Networking Basics
json_data.reason: This topic complements the understanding of the Network Manager component by introducing fundamental concepts of how computers communicate, which is essential for any modern OS.

json_data.title: Process Management and CPU Scheduling Algorithms
json_data.reason: This builds directly on the 'Processor Manager' and 'Threads' concepts by exploring the specific techniques and algorithms an OS uses to manage and schedule tasks efficiently.

json_data.title: Virtualization and Containerization Technologies
json_data.reason: This topic extends the understanding of resource management and cloud computing by delving into advanced techniques for isolating and deploying applications, which are critical in modern system architectures.
